Description

`numpy.rint` returns either a ndarray or scalar from: https://numpy.org/doc/stable/reference/generated/numpy.rint.html#numpy.rint
but cupy returns a `cupy.ndarray`, is this expected?

```shell
> python test.py
<class 'numpy.int64'>
<class 'cupy.ndarray'>
[1647 8534 1848 ... 3270 1723  957]
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/home/fedemengo/workspace/test/test.py", line 16, in <module>
    xp_ii = xp.random.choice(xp_a, size, replace=False)
  File "/home/fedemengo/workspace/test/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/cupy/random/_sample.py", line 190, in choice
    return rs.choice(a, size, replace, p)
  File "/home/fedemengo/workspace/test/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/cupy/random/_generator.py", line 1091, in choice
    raise NotImplementedError
NotImplementedError
```

### To Reproduce

```py
> cat test.py
import numpy as np
import cupy as xp

a = 9128
size = 8256

nn_a = np.rint(a).astype(int)
xp_a = xp.rint(a).astype(int)

print(type(nn_a))
print(type(xp_a))

np_ii = np.random.choice(nn_a, size, replace=False)
print(np_ii)

xp_ii = xp.random.choice(xp_a, size, replace=False)
print(xp_ii)
```


### Installation

Wheel (`pip install cupy-***`)

### Environment

```
> python -c "import cupy; cupy.show_config()"
